title: Overflowing double multiplication leads to incorrect result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value DOUBLE NOT NULL);
SELECT (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id = 1) * (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id = 2) AS result;
SELECT POW((SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id = 1), 2) AS squared_value;
SELECT (NULL + (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id = 1)) * (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id = 2) AS null_handling_result;
key_bug_features: Double multiplication overflow causes incorrect results
